minimum_image_evidence: At least one image showing the affected panel or part with the damage visible. Close-up preferred.
At least one image showing the cracked or shattered component. Close-up of crack lines required.
At least one image showing the damaged or missing part. Wide-angle context image helpful.
At least one image of the affected panel showing multiple small dents or impact marks.
At least one image of the glass surface. Close-up showing crack pattern required.
At least one image showing the cracked component. Close-up of the crack lines preferred.
At least one image showing the affected part with visible damage.
At least one image showing staining or liquid residue on the affected part.
At least one image showing the broken or missing component from an angle that confirms absence or breakage.
At least one image showing the damaged packaging area. Close-up of crushed or torn region required.
At least one image showing visible staining, wetness marks, or discoloration consistent with water exposure.
At least one image showing the open package interior clearly enough to determine if contents are absent.
At least one image showing the label area clearly enough to assess readability.
At least one image showing the stained area of the package.
Images must show the claimed object. Images that show a different object type do not satisfy any requirement.
Blurry, dark, or heavily obstructed images may not satisfy minimum evidence requirements on their own.
